Pakistan kills 408 in Kabul. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Putin-Trump call TODAY is wildcard — Ukraine focus, not ME de-escalation. Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Iran allowing more ships through Strait of Hormuz — traffic trickling back after blockade
latest_news.text: Ship-tracking data shows Iran allowing growing number of commercial vessels through Hormuz after near-total disruption. 11 China-linked vessels transited March 1-15. Partial de-escalation of blockade posture.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine deploys 201 military experts to Gulf to counter Iranian drones
latest_news.text: Zelensky announces 201 Ukrainian military experts sent to Gulf states to counter Iranian drones, claims drones 'contain Russian components'. Ukraine actively opposing Iran in Gulf theater.

latest_news.headline: Senate Intel hearing TODAY — Gabbard defends Trump's war decision amid Kent resignation fallout
latest_news.text: Gabbard testifying before Senate Intel Committee. Previously said president 'is responsible for determining imminent threat.' Kent resigned saying Iran 'posed no imminent threat.' Hearing ongoing — results TBD.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan defence minister confirms 'open war' with Afghanistan
latest_news.text: Pakistan defence minister describes situation as 'open war' with Afghanistan. Oct 2025 ceasefire fully collapsed. UNAMA: 75+ civilians killed, 193 injured since Feb 26.

latest_news.headline: Russia takes Sopych (Sumy) and Kalenyky (Donetsk) — 1,710 casualties in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces take two more villages. 1,710 Russian soldiers killed/wounded in past 24 hours. 12 settlements taken in first two weeks of March per Gerasimov.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 22, 07:04 UTC) — War Day 20. Key developments: (1) Hormuz traffic trickling back — partial de-escalation of Iran's blockade posture; (2) Ukraine sends 201 drone experts to Gulf — unprecedented cross-theater involvement; (3) Senate Intel hearing TODAY — Gabbard defends war, Kent resignation fallout; (4) Pakistan 'open war' confirmed — 400+ dead Kabul strike; (5) Russia grinds forward in Ukraine — 1,710 casualties/24h. Oil ~$102. ONE de-escalation signal (Hormuz partial reopening) vs multiple escalation vectors.
